app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.43 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for corrected episode titles, customizable navigation tabs, safer Kids navigation, and the new Sports page.
releaseNotes: Improved playback discovery so all native server groups get a fair request window
Improved recovery when a stream is slow, expired, or unavailable
Added stronger fallback parsing for protected stream links
Improved movie and series search coverage with richer metadata matching
Fixed Resume opening the latest watched episode instead of always starting at S1 E1
Fixed TV Specials keeping the correct season number
Improved server labels and quality choices
Improved TV player loading and error actions
Fixed episode titles staying stale after switching episodes
Added customizable navigation tabs in Settings
Kept Sports and Anime hidden from Kids profiles
Added a contained Sports page with native offline handling

items.title: The Cube 2.0.43
items.message: Episode titles, customizable navigation, Kids-safe tabs, and Sports were improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
